info.title: PackProject.Tool
info.description: Provides ability to pack project with project-to-project references

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Generates NuGet package for specified project including all project dependencies as separate NuGet packages with same version.

options.name: configuration
options.description: Defines the build configuration. The default for most projects is Debug, but you can override the build configuration settings in your project.

options.name: force
options.description: Forces all dependencies to be resolved even if the last restore was successful. Specifying this flag is the same as deleting the project.assets.json file.

options.name: include-source
options.description: Includes the debug symbols NuGet packages in addition to the regular NuGet packages in the output directory. The sources files are included in the src folder within the symbols package.

options.name: include-symbols
options.description: Includes the debug symbols NuGet packages in addition to the regular NuGet packages in the output directory.

options.name: interactive
options.description: Allows the command to stop and wait for user input or action (for example, to complete authentication).

options.name: no-build
options.description: Doesn't build the project before packing. It also implicitly sets the --no-restore flag.

options.name: no-restore
options.description: Doesn't execute an implicit restore when running the command.

options.name: nologo
options.description: Doesn't display the startup banner or the copyright message.

options.name: output
options.description: Places the built packages in the directory specified.

options.name: runtime
options.description: Specifies the target runtime to restore packages for.

options.name: serviceable
options.description: Sets the serviceable flag in the package.

options.name: version-suffix
options.description: Defines the value for the $(VersionSuffix) MSBuild property in the project.

options.name: verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic].

options.name: output-graph
options.description: Set filename for generating project dependency graph.

options.name: warn-downgrade
options.description: Warn when possible package downgrade detected.

options.name: disallow-downgrade
options.description: Terminate tool execution when package downgrade detected.
